problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
hypothesis: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Acoustic. Acoustic levitation for contactless manipulation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
